chapter_title: Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
text:

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 395. Outdoor Signs & Motorist Info. Panels on Toll Roads in Certain Counties
##### § 395.010 — Penalty

(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates a rule adopted under this subchapter that defines an offense.

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person violates a rule adopted under this subchapter that defines an offense.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.
